title: Spicy Chinese Green Beans
description: A quick and easy Chinese-inspired dish featuring green beans, onions, and a hint of spice. Perfect as a side or light lunch. Serve immediately to enjoy the best flavor and texture.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until it starts to soften.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the green beans and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the tagine, chili flakes, and salt to taste. Stir to combine.
Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes, or until the green beans are tender but still crisp.
Serve immediately, garnished with sliced green onions if desired.
